appliedUpdates.description: Created user-testing.md with service URLs, startup commands, seed data info, PDF export details, frontend page routes, concurrency settings, and flow validator guidance for web browser testing

notes: Re-run after fix-pdf-css-variables feature fixed the CSS var() resolution issue. VAL-UI-009 now passes: PDF endpoint returns HTTP 200 with valid %PDF-1.4 content (6169 bytes), Download PDF button visible on report page. All other ui-demo assertions (VAL-UI-001 through VAL-UI-014 except VAL-UI-009) were already passed in the previous user-testing round.
